stemHtml: Continued Airworthiness after damage – When an aircraft has sustained damage, the aircraft shall be allowed to resume its flight, if the…

options.a: State of Registry, the State of Design and the State of Manufacture consider that the aircraft is still airworthy.
options.b: State of Registry considers that the damage sustained is of such nature that the aircraft is still airworthy.
options.c: State of Design and the State of Manufacture inform the State of Registry that the aircraft is still airworthy.
options.d: State of Manufacture informs the State of Registry that the damage sustained is of a nature such that the aircraft is still airworthy.
